v8.0: All agents perform real work — no more NO-OPs
v8.0: Dispatch result tracking — CEO sees success/failure of every action

departments.marketing: MarketingAgent — SEO landing pages, blog content, B2B outreach. Writes to marketing/ dir.
departments.devops: DevOpsAgent — Manifest audits (MV2→MV3), version bumps, build pipeline. Writes audit reports.
departments.compliance: ComplianceAgent — Permission audits, privacy declarations, CWS policy checks.
departments.infrastructure: InfrastructureAgent — Cloudflare/Railway health checks, DNS management, KV operations.
departments.qa: QAAgent — 7-check automated audit: portfolio, landing page, releases, infra, workflows, MV audit, desc length.
departments.finance: FinanceAgent — Stripe revenue monitoring, refund detection, billing health. Requires STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.
departments.security: SecurityAgent — Credential presence audit, exposed secret scanning, dependency checks.
departments.customer_success: CustomerSuccessAgent — KV ticket monitoring, rejection tracking, response times.

email_forwarding_policy.rationale: Owner only receives emails requiring human intervention. Routine reports logged to KV.

P1_HIGH: License database had no backup — FIXED: auto-backup with rolling 5-copy window.
No audit log rotation — FIXED: auto-rotate at 50K lines.
No disk space monitoring — FIXED: alerts at 80%/95%.
No scheduler self-healing — FIXED: watchdog auto-restarts with backoff.
No memory leak protection — FIXED: memory guard at 512MB.
Discord notifications no retry — FIXED: 3x retry + file fallback.
CWS API no retry/circuit breaker — FIXED: retry + circuit breaker.
Ledger had no backup before LLM overwrite — FIXED v8.0: 20-backup rolling window.
DevOps/Compliance agents were NO-OPs — FIXED v8.0: real implementations.
P2_MEDIUM: Security headers missing — FIXED: HSTS, XSS, Frame-Options.
No request ID tracking — FIXED: UUID per request.
Board Coordinator sends emails to OpenAI — FIXED v8.0: PII redaction.
No QA/testing function — FIXED v7.0: QA Agent runs every cycle.
git add -A in workflow too broad — FIXED v8.0: scoped to known-safe paths.
Email digest had \n formatting bug — FIXED v8.0: moved digest to coordinator.

gitignore_warning: The _*/** rule in .gitignore blocks all files inside _-prefixed directories. Tracked files were force-added before this rule existed. Any NEW file in _scripts/ must use: git add -f _scripts/<filename>
